item.ptxt: Do not pinch any object during initialization of sun roof motor.

Be sure to initialize sun roof motor (setting fully closed position of sun roof glass) when sun roof unit or sun roof motor is replaced. Auto operation including anti-pinching function cannot be performed without initialization of sun roof motor.

s1.ptxt: Set ignition “ON”, press “TILT UP” side of sun roof switch to fully tilt up sun roof glass.
Keep pressing “TILT UP” side of sun roof switch for more than 15 seconds and then release it.
Press “TILT UP” side of sun roof switch again soon after releasing it and hold it until sun roof's tilt down, slide open and slide close operations are completed.
Release “TILT UP” side of sun roof switch when the sun roof is completely closed.
Conduct auto tilt down / up and auto slide open / close to check that auto functions work normally. (Repeat from Step 1) if any auto function is faulty.)

attention2.ptxt: Roof may be deformed if hard material such as bare hammer handle is pinched.

s1.ptxt: Slide open sun roof glass fully.
Place hammer handle (2) wrapped with cloth (1) close to fully closed position.
Perform auto slide close of sun roof glass.
Check that sun roof glass reverses (open about 125 mm (4.92 in.)) automatically instead of pinching hammer handle.
If defect is found, replace sun roof motor.
